explanation:
**Personal finance and investing** use universal mathematical principles (compound interest, time value of money, risk-return optimization). This calculator applies standard industry financial formulas.

## How It's Calculated

Net returns after taxes on your fixed deposit.

This calculator applies the formula with your values, verifying typical ranges and alerting you to unusual values.

## Typical Benchmarks by Term

| Term | S&P 500 | 10-Year Bonds | Cash |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 year | Highly variable | 4-5% | 3-5% |
| 5 years | ~8% avg | ~4% | Inflation |
| 10 years | ~9-10% | ~4% | <inflation |
| 20+ years | ~10% nominal | ~5% | N/A |

## Investment Principles

- **Don't panic-sell** during crises. Emotion is your worst advisor.
- **Diversify**: don't concentrate in one asset/sector/country.
- **Keep costs low**: fees >1% annually eat 30% of your returns over 30 years.
- **Long time horizon**: stocks work over 10+ years, not 1 year.
- **Rebalance once yearly**, not more.

## Final Notes

This calculation is a reference guide only. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult a specialized professional. Values are current to 2026 and reviewed periodically.

faq.a: A fixed deposit is an investment where you commit funds for a fixed period at a guaranteed interest rate. You earn returns based on the principal, rate, and term.

faq.q: How are fixed deposit returns taxed?
faq.a: Interest income from fixed deposits is typically taxed as ordinary income. The tax rate depends on your jurisdiction and tax bracket.
Enter your principal amount, investment term, and annual interest rate. The calculator applies the standard formula to show your net returns after taxes.

faq.q: What's the difference between a CD and a savings account?
faq.a: CDs (Certificates of Deposit) offer fixed rates for a set period and typically pay more interest. Savings accounts offer liquidity but lower rates.

faq.q: Can I withdraw early from a fixed deposit?
faq.a: Most fixed deposits allow early withdrawal, but you'll typically forfeit accrued interest and may face penalties.
Results are approximate within ±5%. For critical financial decisions, consult a professional advisor.
Our data and formulas are current to 2026 and reviewed periodically to keep information accurate.
Yes, all Hacé Cuentas calculators are completely free and require no registration.

faq.q: Do you store my personal data?
faq.a: No. All calculations happen in your browser. We never send your data to any server.
